meaning: n.(报刊上的)政治性漫画,讽刺画,卡通画,漫画(常有解说词)v.画漫画n.卡通片,动画片
examples: Mickey Mouse, Donald Duck, and other Disney cartoon characters gave endless delight to millions of children.
Disney has made many cartoon movies.
Such shows can raise parental ire, says Robert Higgins, programming director for Cartoon Network.
It was Eminem who gave Mister Cartoon the kind of publicity money can't buy.
